## Source: amazon-inspector (4f09b2cb596d2186d9533b703e85192087a2722c8307c51428330658f1972c3a)
The package deepl-sync was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (83c73e62921aa4df80420b722eb2c670f6d84598781ecca53ed7b761c406931d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'deepl-sync' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
